name: tab-session-monitor
description: Streams JSON-line events as TAB sessions advance: phase transitions, subagent start/return, budget thresholds.

name: tab-stall-guard
description: Detects subagents stalled >30 min without SubagentStop (pre-first-token hangs, MCP setup stalls). Second-line defense beyond the Claude Code ≥ v2.1.113 native 10-min kill.
